stemHtml: Per ICAO Annex 2, a controlled flight in VMC that loses radio contact shall...

options.a: use the emergency frequency to inform ATC and land at the nearest aerodrome.
options.b: continue in VMC to the nearest suitable aerodrome and report to ATC after landing.
options.c: continue in VMC to the destination and report after landing.
options.d: use visual signals and set transponder to the appropriate code.
